text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whew, what a productive practice session!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hang on—I'd better write down what I learned
today before I go to bed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Let's see, today in training, I learned about...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second, this is the last page in my
notebook!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh... I'll have to go buy a new one tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I... I sure crammed a lot of information into this
thing, didn't I? Haha...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Especially since Trainer took me on—the sheer
volume of notes has basically doubled! That's
kind of impressive.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and my times have really improved as well.
Wow...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. I'll have to thank Trainer tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Sakura Chiyono O approaches me
formally, bows, and gives me a drink as a
thank-you gift.
